summary: Comprehensive testing of WorkOS Enterprise Platform (TeamOS MVP). All core features working. Backend: 18/19 tests pass (AI chat intermittent 500). Frontend: all pages, KPIs, Kanban, meetings, files, settings, AI Copilot, role-based dashboards all working.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error intermittently. Possibly LLM rate limit or model name issue. Works from UI though (may have retries). Model used: claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929
405 Method Not Allowed - no GET by task_id endpoint exists. Only GET /api/tasks (list) and PUT/DELETE /api/tasks/{id}

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='notifications-button' and data-testid='ai-copilot-toggle' mentioned in files_of_reference but NOT present in DOM. Buttons exist but without testid
Clicking sidebar nav links while task detail panel is open doesn't navigate - appears blocked by panel overlay. Direct URL navigation works fine.

issues: AI chat input field uses placeholder 'Ask anything...' but hard to find via selector - could use data-testid

action_items: Add data-testid='notifications-button' to the bell icon in Layout.jsx header
Add data-testid='ai-copilot-toggle' to AI Copilot button in Layout.jsx header
Add data-testid='ai-chat-input' to the chat input field in AI Copilot panel
Fix sidebar navigation when task detail panel is open (close panel on nav click or fix z-index)
Investigate AI chat 500 error - may need error handling/retry in backend
critical_code_review_comments: Missing GET /api/tasks/{task_id} endpoint - only list endpoint exists; if task detail view is needed standalone, this needs to be added
AI chat error handling: backend should catch LLM exceptions and return meaningful 4xx/5xx with message rather than generic 500
server.py is 1109 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth.py, tasks.py, meetings.py, analytics.py etc.)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core flows working, minor selector/testid issues)

seed_data_creation: Seed data auto-created by backend on startup. Additional TEST_ prefixed tasks created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user roles tested (super_admin/hod/worker). Kanban board with 5 columns works. Task detail panel with comments works. AI Copilot opens and responds (backend occasionally 500s but UI works). data-testid missing for notifications-button and ai-copilot-toggle. Auth uses httpOnly cookies (use session-based requests not Bearer token for API tests).
